news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $292.5 mln.
Foxit to showcase PDF accessibility innovations at EDUCAUSE 2024 with enhanced Accessible Math capabilities.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Foxit, a prominent provider of innovative PDF and eSignature solutions, is set to exhibit its advanced PDF accessibility features at EDUCAUSE 2024 in San Antonio, Texas. The company aims to assist knowledge workers in boosting productivity and maximizing document capabilities. Specifically, Foxit will showcase its upgraded Accessible Math features at the event. Leveraging the most current PDF 2.0 standards, these capabilities make intricate mathematical formulas accessible to individuals. This initiative underscores Foxit's commitment to enhancing document accessibility and empowering users.

news.headline: CareSource partners with Nomi Health to improve healthcare access for 2 million members in Ohio, Georgia, and Indiana.
news.summary: CareSource, a non-profit health plan serving more than 2 million members, has chosen to collaborate with Nomi Health to introduce a new initiative to address healthcare disparities for its Medicaid members in Ohio, Georgia, and Indiana. The partnership intends to strengthen access to crucial healthcare services and boost health outcomes for individuals encountering obstacles to care. Through this joint effort, the two organizations aim to make a significant impact in closing gaps in healthcare accessibility and quality for the benefit of members in these states.

news.headline: Wag Hotels in Sacramento to host 9th Annual Howl-o-ween party for dogs on Oct 24 from 6:30-8:00pm.
news.summary: Wag Hotels in Sacramento, California will be hosting their yearly Halloween celebration for dogs on Thursday, October 24th, from 6:30 to 8:00 pm.

news.headline: Asian World Film Festival marks 10th anniversary in LA, revealing event dates and programs. Los Angeles' top Asian film celebration.
news.summary: Los Angeles is set to host the prestigious Asian World Film Festival (AWFF) to mark its tenth anniversary, celebrating Asian filmmakers. Scheduled for Oct. 17, 2024, this renowned event is a significant showcase for the industry. The festival, a key highlight in Los Angeles, promises a gathering of cinematic talents and enthusiasts. The 10th edition is expected to draw a large audience as it features some of the most anticipated films in the Asian film scene. It's a testament to the growing popularity and recognition of Asian cinema globally.

news.headline: Founder of Little Saints, Megan Klein, to feature on Shark Tank Season 16 premiere with non-alcoholic cocktails and spirits powered by functional mushrooms. Premiering on October 18th at 8pm EST.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Megan Klein, the Miami entrepreneur behind Little Saints, a line of non-alcoholic beverages infused with functional mushrooms, is set to appear on the season premiere of the popular television show Shark Tank. The episode will air on October 18th at 8pm EST. Megan Klein’s company offers a unique alternative in the market, combining healthy ingredients with innovative flavors. Make sure to tune in to see if she can secure investment from the sharks.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee does not comment on monetary policy or the economic outlook in his welcoming remarks to a conference on careers in economics.
LoanPro introduces Smart Verify tool for identity verification & ongoing monitoring with third-party data integration.
news.summary: In a release made today, LoanPro, a contemporary lending and credit platform based in Salt Lake City, revealed the introduction of Smart Verify. This innovative suite of data solutions incorporates external data sources into their system to facilitate swift identity verification and continuous monitoring for both business and consumer accounts. With the current market instability and frequent changes in regulations, financial institutions and credit providers often resort to antiquated third-party data for crucial decision-making in account management.

news.headline: CData to host virtual Foundations Conference on Nov 20-21, 2024, focused on modern data connectivity strategies for business efficiency and AI success.
news.summary: CData Software ("CData"), a top data connectivity solutions provider, has revealed details about their inaugural company conference called Foundations. This event is set to occur online on November 20-21, 2024. Foundations aims to delve into the process of creating a contemporary data connectivity strategy that enhances business productivity while laying down a sturdy groundwork for successful AI ventures. This conference's content is centered around empowering companies to seamlessly integrate data for optimal performance and innovation.

news.headline: Keysight introduces PathWave Advanced Power Application Suite for battery testing & design, to consolidate software tools, helping engineers face increasing test challenges.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has unveiled the PathWave Advanced Power Application Suite. This innovative software platform aims to quicken battery testing and design procedures. It merges several key features, including PathWave’s IV Curve Measurement software, Advanced Power Control and Analysis, and Advanced Battery Test and Emulation, into one unified test environment. With a rise in complexities related to battery design, engineers encounter growing test hurdles. This suite offers a comprehensive solution to help them navigate these challenges effectively.

news.headline: Platform9 launches Private Cloud Director, the new standard for enterprise private cloud management; aims to address rising costs, vendor lock-in, limited flexibility.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Platform9 has unveiled Private Cloud Director, setting a new benchmark for managing enterprise private clouds. This launch comes at a crucial time as IT departments are facing challenges in the virtualization sector. Rising costs, vendor dependencies, and inflexible solutions are becoming unsustainable for businesses. The Private Cloud Director aims to address these issues and deliver a more agile and feature-rich private cloud experience. This news signals a significant move in the industry as organizations seek better solutions for their cloud management.

news.headline: Transact Campus and Ellucian partner for cloud-based payment solutions in higher education, enhancing campus technology.
news.summary: Transact Campus, Inc., a prominent leader in campus technology and payment solutions, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has partnered with Ellucian, a top provider of higher education technology solutions, to expand their strategic partnership. This development underscores the increasing trend towards cloud-based solutions in the higher education sector. This collaboration leverages their existing relationship to enhance Transact's integrated payment solution.

news.headline: Travelers donates $250,000 to hurricane relief efforts for Helene and Milton in affected states.
news.summary: HARTFORD, Conn.-- In a statement released today, The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) declared a pledge of $250,000 towards aiding the relief endeavors in regions hit by Hurricanes Helene and Milton. The funds are designated to assist organizations such as All Hands and Hearts, SBP, Team Rubicon, and United Way Suncoast. Alan Schnitzer, the Chairman and CEO of Travelers, voiced, " The areas affected by Hurricanes Helene and Milton are where our customers, colleagues, and acquaintances reside. Our dedication to supporting them remains unwavering."

news.headline: Textron Aviation introduces EvoX upgrades for Cessna Citation and Beechcraft King Air, providing specialized aftermarket packages.
news.summary: Textron Aviation has introduced a new aftermarket upgrade program called "EvoX" tailored for customers of Cessna Citation and Beechcraft King Air aircraft. The program aims to offer specialized packages for enhancing the performance and features of these planes. This initiative is expected to provide significant benefits to owners and operators of approximately 20000 Cessna Citation and Beechcraft King Air aircraft worldwide.

news.headline: Expedia Group appoints Ramana Thumu as Chief Technology Officer; to oversee technology organization.
news.summary: In Seattle on October 17, 2024, Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) appointed Ramana Thumu as its new Chief Technology Officer. Ramana will be in charge of guiding Expedia Group's technology division, which includes engineering, data, artificial intelligence, and cloud platforms.

news.headline: Sabey Data Centers finishes construction at Austin, Texas data center site in Round Rock, Texas campus.
news.summary: Sabey Corporation based in Seattle has recently finished construction of the inaugural building on its upcoming data center campus in Round Rock, Texas. This marks a significant milestone for the company's expansion into the area.

news.headline: Chris Inglis, former National Cyber Director, joins MITRE board of trustees for leadership in cybersecurity.
news.summary: In MCLEAN, Virginia, Chris Inglis, former national cyber director and NSA deputy director, has been elected by MITRE's Board of Trustees to join the company's board. Mark Peters, MITRE president and CEO, expressed enthusiasm for Inglis' appointment, noting his extensive experience in cybersecurity and national security. Inglis will be pivotal in addressing new cyber threats facing networks and critical infrastructure. MITRE, with over 50 years of experience, aims to enhance global cybersecurity defenses.

news.headline: Aaron Wagner, Ph.D., joins Integer Technologies as Chief Strategy Officer, focusing on growth and delivery of technology portfolio for defense and commercial clients.
news.summary: A defense technology corporation based in Columbia, South Carolina, Integer Technologies, has recently welcomed Aaron Wagner, Ph.D., as their new Chief Strategy Officer. Dr. Wagner will be tasked with overseeing the strategic expansion and deployment of Integer’s technology range, catering to the requirements of defense, intelligence, and commercial sectors. The company is known for providing advanced engineering solutions to both government and private clientele. This move is aimed at enhancing Integer's services in areas such as uncrewed systems, sensors and perception, as well as power and energy systems.

news.headline: Komodo Health launches National Drug Projections offering insight into prescription trends with real-time data.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a healthcare technology company called Komodo Health has unveiled a new product called National Drug Projections. This tool provides customers with comprehensive insights into prescription filling trends nationwide for various medication categories. The product offers real-time data on prescription volume, units dispensed, and new patient initiations, enabling a thorough grasp of treatment dynamics. This information aims to enhance decision-making processes for stakeholders in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Internet Computer cryptocurrency (ICP) drops over 3% in value within 24 hours, falling to $7.68 from $7.86.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Internet Computer (CRYPTO: ICP) dropped by 3.62% to reach $7.68. This decline is part of a negative trend observed in the past week, during which ICP has faced a 2.0% decrease from $7.86 to its current value. The graph illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Internet Computer over this period. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kaspa cryptocurrency down 8.3% in 24 hours to $0.12, continuing the week's 6.0% decline from $0.13.
news.summary: Over the last 24 hours, Kaspa (CRYPTO:KAS) has seen a significant 8.3% drop in price, now standing at $0.12. This continues the downtrend observed in the past week, with a decrease of 6.0% from $0.13. The price movements and volatility can be visualized in the provided chart, showing the fluctuations in the last day on the left, contrasted with the trends over the week. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Iowa State University's TrAC implements Vocareum's Notebook in NAIRR classroom for advanced AI education.
news.summary: A new advanced AI curriculum has been introduced by the Translational AI Center (TrAC) at Iowa State University. This curriculum utilizes Vocareum's Notebook platform and is being implemented in the National Science Foundation (NSF) NAIRR Classroom in San Jose, California. The launch took place on October 17, 2024. The National Artificial Intelligence Research Resource (NAIRR) Classroom is at the forefront of AI education and research, emphasizing hands-on learning experiences for students. Iowa State University's TrAC is leading the way in AI education, providing valuable resources for students across the country.

news.headline: Injective's cryptocurrency (INJ) has surged 3.38% in 24 hours, now priced at $21.62. Over the past week, it saw a 13.0% increase, from $19.02. All-time high remains at $52.62.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Injective (CRYPTO: INJ) has increased by 3.38% to reach $21.62. This adds to its overall positive performance over the previous week, with a notable 13.0% increase from $19.02. Currently, its all-time high stands at $52.62.

news.headline: US to sell $24 bln 5-year TIPS on October 24th, to settle on October 31st.
US to sell $81 bln 3-month bills on October 21, to settle on October 24.
US to sell $72 bln 6-month bills on October 21st, to settle on October 24th.
In 2025, AB “Ignitis grupė”'s Networks segment's distribution services income level set by NERC. Resolutions adopted on price caps and other regulatory components for the year.
news.summary: AB “Ignitis grupė” (referred to as the Group) has announced that on 17 October 2024, the National Energy Regulatory Council (referred to as NERC) approved resolutions regarding the price caps for electricity distribution services of AB “Energijos skirstymo operatorius” (referred to as ESO) for the year 2025. Additionally, the resolutions included the income cap for gas distribution service of ESO for 2025 and other regulatory components for the same year. This decision was made in accordance with the Methodology for determining the price caps for electricity transmission, distribution, and public supply services and the Methodology for determining the regulated prices in the natural gas sector.

news.headline: National Fuel Gas Company plans to release Q4 fiscal 2024 earnings on Nov. 6, 2024 after market close.
news.summary: A company based in Williamsville, NY, National Fuel Gas Company (NYSE: NFG), disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024 on November 6, 2024, following the close of the market.

news.headline: New joint venture formed, with $5 million investment, to enter market & create 100 new jobs. Exciting news for economy.
Sky Quarry will participate in the Nasdaq closing bell ceremony on October 25, 2024.
US to sell $13 bln reopened 20-year bonds on October 23rd, to settle on October 31st.
Interpublic launches "Interact" platform to integrate data, media, creative and production, driving business outcomes for clients.
news.summary: The introduction of Interact signifies the holding company's latest initiative in coordinating comprehensive brand marketing strategies to deliver tangible business results for clients. This new platform aims to streamline the process of engaging with customers and boosting brand presence, with potential to significantly impact key performance indicators by improving customer interactions and driving business growth.

news.headline: Update: Company refinances debt, saving $50 million in interest payments over the next 5 years.
Businesses shifting from downsizing to rightsizing post-pandemic for profit maximization in DC metro area.Key points: OMX reports increase in rightsizing.
news.summary: The business market in Washington, DC has undergone a significant shift following the pandemic. Instead of focusing on cost-cutting through office downsizing, businesses are now maximizing profits by rightsizing their office spaces. This shift has led to a notable increase in office space utilization efficiency in the region.

news.headline: Cambridge Innovation Institute acquires Grey Green Media assets, adding key events in food, DTx, and mental healthcare.
news.summary: Cambridge Innovation Institute has recently incorporated three significant events into its calendar: Food as Medicine, DTx, and Future of Mental Healthcare. This move comes as CII has acquired assets from GreyGreen Media, a London-based company. The acquisition, which occurred on October 17, 2024, marks a strategic decision for CII, which has been in operation for over seven years.

news.headline: Richard Welshons NTP elected as ALTA president for 2024-2025, representing land title insurance industry.
news.summary: In Washington on October 17, 2024, Richard Welshons NTP has been appointed as the President of the American Land Title Association (ALTA) for the term 2024-2025. ALTA, the leading trade association in the land title insurance sector, selected Welshons for the prestigious position. Welshons brings with him a wealth of experience and expertise to the role. His leadership will be crucial in guiding the association during the upcoming year. ALTA represents a significant number of members in the industry, showing its influence and importance in the field.

news.headline: Blue Shield of California named as one of U.S. News & World Report's 2024 Best Companies to Work For in Private Company and Healthcare Services categories.
news.summary: In Oakland, California on October 17, 2024, Blue Shield of California has been recognized by U.S. News & World Report as one of the Best Companies to Work For in 2024. This recognition includes being named in both the Private Company and Healthcare Services categories. The company's achievement underscores its commitment to providing top-tier health care services while also offering an excellent work environment. This acknowledgment highlights Blue Shield of California's position as a leading employer, reflecting its dedication to quality and employee satisfaction.

news.headline: Robinhood introduces advanced tools for experienced traders; aiming to cater to high volume trades.
PerfectQuote partners with Nippon Life Insurance Company of America to enhance group health digital quoting. Subscribers gain access to direct, underwritten quotes from NLB.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on October 17, 2024, PerfectQuote, Inc., a prominent company in group health digital quoting solutions, revealed its collaboration with Nippon Life Insurance Company of America® (Nippon Life Benefits or NLB). This partnership allows PerfectQuote subscribers to directly access underwritten insurance plans offered by NLB.

news.headline: TIE 2024 launches at Taipei, focusing on "Smart Tech Island," emphasizing AI integration into daily life.
news.summary: Today, in Taipei on October 17, 2024, the 2024 Taiwan Innotech Expo (TIE) commenced at the Taipei World Trade Center, emphasizing the theme "Smart Tech Island – The New Era of AI." This event marks a significant step towards integrating advanced technologies into daily life.

news.headline: Key construction CEOs unite to address mental health & suicide in industry, forming advisory council with major companies.
news.summary: A council comprising major companies like Bechtel, Fluor, Stanley Black & Decker, Turner Construction Company, North America's Building Trades Unions, Kiewit, Clark Construction, DPR Construction, and Skanska has been formed to support suicide prevention and mental health initiatives. This collaboration aims to strengthen efforts in these critical areas. The council was established in Reston, Va., on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: GIGABYTE AORUS to showcase AI-powered gaming at Paris Games Week 2024, enhancing experience with latest hardware.
news.summary: In Taipei on October 17, 2024, GIGABYTE AORUS announced its participation in Paris Games Week 2024 to showcase the "AORUS Infinity" theme. The event aims to provide advanced AI experiences to gamers by integrating innovative AI technology. The exhibit will feature the newest gaming hardware to create immersive gaming experiences.

news.headline: Southwest Airlines partners with Valero to bring sustainable aviation fuel to Chicago Midway Airport in Illinois' largest SAF supply agreement.
news.summary: Valero is anticipated to provide the largest amount of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) ever recorded in Illinois. This agreement was disclosed by Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) on October 17, 2024. The deal involves a SAF supply agreement with Valero Marketing and Supply Company to procure a significant volume of SAF for Southwest Airlines' operations.

news.headline: MAVTV expands access by launching to all DIRECTV streaming customers, offering passion-fueled motorsports content.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, MAVTV, a leading media platform for motorsports, powersports, and automotive content, revealed its official debut to all viewers who access DIRECTV without a satellite dish. MAVTV continues to be accessible to DIRECTV customers.

news.headline: Milton Hershey School President Pete Gurt honored with CORE Lifetime Achievement Award at 2024 conference.
news.summary: In Hershey, Pennsylvania on October 17, 2024, the President of Milton Hershey School (MHS), Pete Gurt, was recognized with the prestigious Lifetime Achievement Award at the 2024 Coalition of Residential Excellence (CORE) conference. This accolade is bestowed upon exceptional individuals affiliated with CORE member schools, celebrating their contributions over the years.

news.headline: Bedsure launches Roverlay Outdoor Blanket on Indiegogo, their first outdoor product, available for order.
news.summary: In New York on October 17, 2024, Bedsure, a renowned brand for home comfort, revealed the introduction of its initial outdoor offering, the Roverlay Outdoor Blanket. Interested customers can now place orders for this product on Indiegogo. The official campaign commenced in mid-October, showcasing the innovative features of the Roverlay blanket designed for outdoor usage.

news.headline: Dodge celebrates 20th anniversary of HEMI®-powered Durango with 710-horsepower 2025 SRT Hellcat Brass Monkey.
news.summary: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on October 17, 2024, Dodge celebrates the anniversary of the HEMI®-powered Dodge Durango by introducing the new 710-horsepower Dodge Durango SRT Hellcat Brass Monkey for 2025. This marks the fourth special-edition vehicle for the Durango and the third in the SRT Hellcat lineup.

news.headline: Robinhood introduces advanced tools for experienced traders, targeting a broader audience. #Robinhood #trading #tools
EIA Crude Cushing Inventories Actual 0.108M (Forecast -, Previous 1.247M)
EIA Crude Oil Inventories Actual -2.191M (Forecast 1.5M, Previous 5.810M)
